fieldInstructions.runtimeFlagName: Supply the exact non-secret runtime flag or environment key in a separate reviewed packet. Do not mutate it here.
fieldInstructions.runtimeFlagTargetValue: Supply the exact non-secret target value in a separate reviewed packet. Do not apply it here.
fieldInstructions.rollbackOwner: Name the owner accountable for rollback before any future mutation gate.
fieldInstructions.rollbackCommand: Supply the rollback command or manual step shape only. Do not run it here.
fieldInstructions.readbackCommand: Supply the command or route check that proves runtime source state without printing secrets or row payloads.
fieldInstructions.productionSmokeCommand: Supply the production smoke command or route sequence without secret output or real-time claims.
fieldInstructions.publicCopyFallbackLine: Supply non-advice fallback copy for stale, unavailable, or rolled-back data.
fieldInstructions.freshnessFallbackLine: Supply freshness-delay copy without real-time guarantee or complete-coverage claims.

stopLine: This is an intake template only. It does not run SQL, connect to Supabase, write data, mutate runtime flags, change production environment values, or promote publicDataSource/scoreSource.
